# Generated by tools/m10_history.py --write; first-century historical currents.
# Dates are emitted only from docs/timeline.csv through AntqDate.
namespace = antq_m10

# Gaius Caesar's Eastern Settlement; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=ARM
antq_m10.1000 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10.1000.title
	desc = antq_m10.1000.desc
	outcome = neutral
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_gaius_eastern_settlement.dds"
	option = {
		name = antq_m10.1000.a
		historical_option = yes
		add_stability = stability_weak_penalty
	}
}

# Kushan Unification; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=YUE
antq_m10.1008 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10.1008.title
	desc = antq_m10.1008.desc
	outcome = positive
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_kushan_unification.dds"
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = YUE
		from = 30.1.1
		to = 51.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10.1008.a
		historical_option = yes
		change_tag_cosmetic = { tag = KSH }
		set_country_rank = country_rank:rank_empire
		add_prestige = prestige_mild_bonus
		add_legitimacy = legitimacy_mild_bonus
	}
}

# Xiongnu Split; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; IRAN-XIO; recipient=XIO
antq_m10.1013 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10.1013.title
	desc = antq_m10.1013.desc
	outcome = positive
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_xiongnu_split.dds"
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XIO
		from = 48.1.1
		to = 49.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10.1013.a
		historical_option = yes
		# Northern slice: IRAN-XIO; local M3 coordinate proxy, documented in docs/m10/.
		location:anaa = {
			create_country_from_location = {
				define_unique_country_tag = XNO
				change_country_name = XNO
				change_country_adjective = XNO
				change_country_color = map_XNO
				change_country_flag = XNO
				change_culture = ROOT.culture
				change_religion = ROOT.religion
				change_government_type = government_type:steppe_horde
				add_reform = government_reform:antq_steppe_confederation
				change_heir_selection = heir_selection:tribal_oldest_male
			}
			add_core = c:XNO
		}
		every_owned_location = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					this = location:khurbe
					this = location:ude_baikal
					this = location:selenge
					this = location:khudan
					this = location:bureen
					this = location:khilgo
					this = location:ulenkhe
					this = location:khimni
					this = location:khilgoson
					this = location:sulkhari
					this = location:non
					this = location:ung
					this = location:gan
					this = location:uur
					this = location:zed
					this = location:dobkuri
					this = location:khatgal
					this = location:zelterijin
					this = location:kyakhta
					this = location:tsokh
					this = location:ulaamgom
					this = location:delger_moron
					this = location:menlu
					this = location:eringiin
					this = location:nuomin
					this = location:tsagaan_usun
					this = location:khadanzaa
					this = location:alyanbulag
					this = location:erzin
					this = location:turuum
					this = location:kuile
					this = location:khan_khentii
					this = location:altan_gadas
					this = location:tarvagatai
					this = location:dzaigil
				}
			}
			change_location_owner = c:XNO
			add_core = c:XNO
		}
		change_tag_cosmetic = { tag = XSO }
		destroy_international_organization = { target = international_organization:antq_xiongnu_confederation }
		add_stability = stability_mild_penalty
	}
}

# Destruction of the Second Temple; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; OCD-JER; recipient=JUD
antq_m10.1023 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10.1023.title
	desc = antq_m10.1023.desc
	outcome = negative
	fire_only_once = yes
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = JUD
		from = 70.1.1
		to = 71.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10.1023.a
		historical_option = yes
		location:jerusalem = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_building_with_at_least_one_level = temple }
				destroy_building = "building(building_type:temple|owner)"
			}
		}
		add_stability = stability_mild_penalty
	}
}
